item.title: Hey <@&1503369065270611998>,
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey <@&1503369065270611998>,

We're now @ [github.com/ente/ente](https://github.com/ente/ente)

More details here: https://ente.com/blog/ente-ente/

GitHub - ente/ente: 💚 End-to-end encrypted cloud for everything.

💚 End-to-end encrypted cloud for everything. Contribute to ente/ente development by creating an account on GitHub.

ente-io/ente is now ente/ente

We've renamed our GitHub org from ente-io to ente

item.title: **For Self-hosters**
item.dc:creator: Manav
item.description:
**For Self-hosters**

Museum now sends email over SMTP only. The legacy `transmail.key` (Zoho ZeptoMail's API) is no longer supported. Transmail still works (if you were using it); you just [configure it over SMTP](https://help.zoho.com/portal/en/kb/zeptomail/faqs/sending-emails/articles/how-to-configure-smtp).

-# If `transmail.key` means nothing to you, this doesn't affect you.

item.title: Hey <@&1503369065270611998>,
item.dc:creator: Brogio
item.description:
Hey <@&1503369065270611998>,

# New [release](https://github.com/ente-io/ente/releases/tag/photos-v1.3.44µ) for **Ente Photos** v1.3.44
- Android: Added support for selecting photos in 3rd party apps
- Android: Added support to review photos directly from camera apps
- Fixed issue with HEIC photos rendering
- Improvements in gallery scrolling performance ⚡
-# Large releases and news will still be posted in <#948956829982031912>. But for smaller ones select the community role at <id:customize>. You can also subscribe with RSS via <:blog:1312884589332660305> https://feeds.brog.io
